errors.exc: OSError: You are trying to access a gated repo. Make sure to have access to it at https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B. 403 Client Error. Cannot access gated repo for url https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B/resolve/main/config.json. Access to model meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B is restricted and you are not in the authorized list.
errors.tb_summary: tribev2.demo_utils.predict -> neuralset.extractors.text loads meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B via huggingface_hub.snapshot_download -> 403

omega_cycle.step3_measure: blocked at first prompt — Llama-3.2-3B gated repo access denied for HF account 'dancinlife'
omega_cycle.step4_byte_identical: deterministic prompt selection only; TRIBE forward never reached
omega_cycle.step5_iterate: DEFERRED — user must request access at https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B (manual gate, ~1-2 business days approval); after grant, re-run scripts/launch_h100_pilot_t1.sh

raw_10_honest: Pod was already RUNNING ~2.5 days at cycle start; user has been incurring idle cost regardless.

Cycle-attributed delta: pod time ~17 min (11:35-11:52 UTC) at $2.99/hr ≈ $0.85 — exceeds the $0.5 cap as a soft cap because the pod was pre-existing (we did not create it). Hard cap behaviour would have terminated the pod; we did NOT terminate it (user-owned, not cycle-owned).

Llama-3.2-3B is gated 'manual' on HF Hub; the cached HF token (write role) is for account 'dancinlife' which is not on the authorized list for this model. This is the exclusive blocker — install / GPU / model load / TTS / whisperx all worked.

TRIBE v2 inference is end-to-end (text→TTS→whisperx→word events→[Llama-3.2-3B text encoder + Wav2VecBert audio encoder + V-JEPA2 video encoder]→fusion→cortical map). Without Llama-3.2-3B weights, the text encoder branch fails and TRIBE cannot produce a forward pass.
Post-grant rerun cost estimate: model load 2 min + 64 prompt × ~10 s/prompt ≈ 13 min total; ~$0.65 at $2.99/hr.
Stub-mode result (state/pilot_t1_result.json, T1_INCONCLUSIVE_STUB) remains the baseline pipeline-integrity record.
verdict_actionable: USER ACTION REQUIRED: visit https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B with HF account 'dancinlife' and click 'I Accept' on the Llama 3.2 Community License gate. After approval (typically ~1-2 business days), re-run `bash anima-tribev2-pilot/scripts/launch_h100_pilot_t1.sh`. Pod stldy2ewplkhsj is still running and will resume from cached deps + cached whisperx large-v3 + cached spacy en_core_web_lg + cached TRIBE v2 weights — only the gated Llama config.json fetch will need to succeed.
